zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：窄幅整理中偏多震荡
zh.content:
Solana当前价格围绕74.5震荡，整体处于窄幅整理结构，短线偏中性略偏多，市场动能有限但未破位走弱，短期观望为主。

MACD维持轻微正值0.3576，显示多头动能仍在但强度有限；均线方面价格略高于SMA20，趋势支撑偏温和延续震荡偏强结构。

上方阻力关注74.8及75.2区域，下方支撑在74.3与SMA20附近74.28，区间收敛等待突破信号短线关键观察带附近。

短线建议以区间交易为主，未放量突破前不追涨；回踩SMA20附近可分批低吸，突破75.2后顺势跟进控制仓位并严格止损执行策略。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana (SOL/USD) is trading near 74.52 after a marginal 24-hour decline, reflecting a largely neutral market structure. Price action remains tightly compressed between 74.30 and 74.86, indicating consolidation rather than a directional breakout. Despite minor weakness, the asset continues to hold above its short-term moving average, suggesting underlying stability and potential accumulation within a low-volatility environment.

The MACD reading at 0.3576 suggests modest bullish momentum, though lack of a signal line limits full confirmation. The histogram still leans positive, indicating buyers retain slight control. With RSI unavailable, momentum is inferred from structure. Trading above the SMA(20) at 74.287 supports a neutral-to-slightly bullish bias, though conviction remains weak without broader momentum confirmation or expansion in volatility.

Immediate support sits at 74.30, with a deeper floor near 74.00 if selling intensifies. A breakdown could expose 73.20 as the next support zone. Resistance is seen at 74.86, followed by 75.50 and 76.20. A clean break above 74.86 would be required to validate renewed bullish momentum and shift price action into a higher trading range with stronger upside potential.

Short-term conditions favor range trading and mean reversion strategies. Buyers may consider entries near 74.30–74.00 with stops below 73.80, targeting rebounds toward 74.86 and 75.50. Sellers may fade resistance until breakout confirmation occurs. A sustained move above resistance would justify trend-following longs. Until then, disciplined risk control remains essential due to compressed volatility and indecisive market structure.
